title: Chewy Announces Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Fiscal Q4 2024 (14 weeks ended February 2, 2025): Net sales reached $3.25 billion, up 14.9% year-over-year. Gross margin expanded to 28.5%, a 30 basis point increase. Adjusted EBITDA of $124.5 million, up $38.1 million from prior year. Adjusted diluted EPS of $0.28, up $0.10 year-over-year. Fiscal 2024 Full Year (53 weeks ended February 2, 2025): Net sales totaled $11.86 billion, up 6.4% year-over-year. Gross margin expanded 80 basis points to 29.2%. Adjusted EBITDA climbed to $570.5 million, up $202.5 million. Adjusted diluted EPS increased to $1.04, up $0.35 from prior year. Net income reached $392.7 million versus $39.6 million prior year. The company reported 20.5 million active customers, representing 2.1% growth. Net sales per active customer increased 4.1% to $578. Autoship subscription customer sales comprised 80.6% of Q4 net sales and 79.2% of full-year sales. CEO Sumit Singh stated: Topline growth and profitability exceeded the high-end of our guidance ranges for both the fourth quarter and full year 2024. Management will host a webcast discussion on March 26, 2025 at 8:00 am ET to discuss results.
